subcodes.first_line: O thou pilgrim of musk-laden breath! Various parties and great multitudes of friends, acquaintances and kindred gather each year [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس احزاب متنوعه و گروه انبوه در هر سنه از دوست و آشنا و خویش
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
